title: From losses to $1M   My 3-year trading journey
author: kichebar
selftext:
I literally stared at my screen when I opened my account  
**$1,024,405.84**

Yes    I finally crossed **$1M**  
Up **+$19,363.72** today  
One day, and it’s more than what some people make in months.

But honestly, what hits me the most isn’t just today.  
It’s the journey:  
**$435K → $707K → $980K → $1M**

📉 Three years ago  
I was chasing momentum, buying on hype, selling on fear.  
Couldn’t sleep after big red days.  
My portfolio felt like a roller coaster    stressed when it went up, stressed when it went down.

What really changed me  
wasn’t “one stock”  
It was a **big loss that finally made me stop and learn**.  
Financials, technicals, risk management, position sizing   
I went all in on learning.

🧠 I finally understood:  
Short-term is luck.  
Long-term is system.  
**No greed, no leverage, no gambling.**

Now when I look back at my equity curve,  
it’s not just money growing   
it’s my **mindset, discipline, and consistency**.

To anyone still on the journey:  
**The market rewards those who take it seriously.**  
Every step you take, your account will remember

replies.body: MU, SNDK, TSM, NBIS, OKLO, LITE, AGX, Tesla, BE, RKLB, and many more. I do swing trading, day trading, and long-term trading

comments.body: Can you share your strategy and your fails with us so that we can learn from them too?

replies.author: kichebar
replies.body: Of course, I’d be happy to share
